site.title: Steam Web Toolbox
site.description: A collection of useful Steam tools

home.hero_desc: Free, open-source Steam tools. All calculations are done locally in your browser, no data is uploaded.

steam2fa.title: Steam TOTP Generator
steam2fa.desc: Generate Steam Mobile Authenticator codes. Drag and drop .maFile or enter shared_secret manually.

cs2_items.title: CS2 Item ID Dictionary
cs2_items.desc: Lookup CS2 item IDs across BUFF, C5, YOUPIN, HALOSKINS and more platforms.

steam2fa.title: Steam TOTP Generator
steam2fa.subtitle: Generate Steam Guard Mobile Authenticator codes
steam2fa.input_placeholder: Enter your shared_secret or drag .maFile here
steam2fa.drag_hint: Drag and drop .maFile here to auto-extract shared_secret
steam2fa.security_note: All calculations are performed locally in your browser. No data is uploaded to any server.

cs2_items.title: CS2 Item ID Dictionary
cs2_items.subtitle: Lookup CS2 item IDs across trading platforms

footer.privacy: Privacy: All calculations are done locally
